message:
refactor(conformance): apply clippy suggestions to FFT diff tests

- Use iter_mut().enumerate() instead of manual indexing in naive_dft
  to satisfy clippy::needless_range_loop.
- Replace manual ceil division `(n + 1) / 2` with `n.div_ceil(2)`.
- Remove redundant inline comment explaining complex multiplication.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
